title: GoalOS Strategic Communications Presentation
headline: GoalOS is the Proof OS for autonomous AI work.
canonical_thesis: AI creates output. GoalOS creates proof. AGIJobs completes missing proof. Only validated capability compounds.
one_sentence_pitch: GoalOS turns one objective into proof-bearing machine labor: agents do the work, jobs carry missing evidence, nodes validate results, ProofBundles return, Evidence Dockets govern claims, and only validated capability can influence the next mission.
